description: T518 must reference all three supply chain factories: F1416 (IArtifactSigningService), F1417 (ISBOMGeneratorService), F1418 (ISLSAAttestationService). Missing any one causes BUILD_FAILURE — artifact.signed will never emit.
rationale: Tripartite signing (sign + SBOM + SLSA) is the minimum supply chain requirement for marketplace artifact distribution. Partial signing is not acceptable.
